TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Latekan no lalood i Cepo' == O lalood i Cepo' , demak i Kiwit , ano eca Lalood i Cepo', o cecay kasasiwtoc no sofitay ato sician a demak no Kalingko, kasasiwtoc o itiniay i Cepo' ato Kiwit 'Amis a tamdaw ato Mancin, itini i 1877 miheca piliyang to "Pipacomod to sakowan i yincumin a demak (Kaisanfufan)" a picingcing no sofitay, tahaikor masamangah no sofitay ira ko kapapatay no demak. Latekan a sowal Pakayni tonini a demak o nai ci Sen Paocen a "Pacomod to sakowan i yincumin a demak (Kaisanfufan)" a satawo', pacomoden ni Wu Guangliang ko sofitay tayni pasawali, pacofilo sa mipalalan nai Kohkoh tangasa i Cepo' to lalan, o niaanan ko sakapiliyang no Kiwit niyaro', Dafdaf niyaro', 'Amisay niyaro, itira to i Cepo' ko kasasiwtocan. Caay pakalowid ko sofitay no Mancin itiya. Orasaka o panono'ay mangahay ko demak ni Wu Guangliang, patirengen ko kali'epahan, misamangah to kapah no Cepo' niyaro'; tangasa i kafecolan a malasang, awaayto ko 'icel milifet, itiya o kowang ko sapipatay to finawlan, saka maemin to malefek ko kapah no 'Amis finacadan itini i Cepo'. Mayakyak kina ratoh i niyaro' i, misatapang to ko finawlan milaliw pakayni i lotolotokan ano eca miti'er to roma a niyaro' itiya . Ikor katengilan a sowal, o naitiniay i sa'owc no Kalingko Posong a "Tacoang (Tangafolan) tamdaw" (Taivoan finacadan tamdaw) ko mipadangay to Mancin sofitay milood to 'Amis finacadan, dotocen ko nano sowal no Tacoang Taivoan tamdaw, pakayni tonini a demak o katatiihan: sa'ayaw ira ko kasasipaloko miselenay to fokoloh ko Taivoan ato 'Amis a tamdaw, akaa pipadang to sofitay no Mancin milood to Cepo' ya sanay, nika paseka a pisa'ada no sofitay no Mancin, mipadang aca micolo' to felac kakaenen, sakalalood, kaforawen no 'Amis mapapatapatay, saka ikor o kasasiwtocan to no konini a katatiihan a demak: Ikor no kapatay no sofitay a maliwasak, tayra ko 'Amis a tamdaw i ka'ayaw no Tacoang (Tangafolan) tamdaw picolo'an to dafong, sakalalood, wata to ko nipatayan nangra a kahengang to ko mata, manengneng ko Tacoang (Tangafolan) tamdaw o pitapa', ira ko Tacoang (Tangafolan) tamdaw misodoc to po'ot a mico'ay, pakanengneng ko tatihiay a Tacoang (Tangafolan) tamdaw to kapatay no cefang i, ana mapatay kako nasa, misodoc to po'ot mipadang to kapot mipatay to 'Amis a tamdaw, romaroma a 'Amiis a tamdaw pakanengneng tonini i wata ko kalim, paretatenga o Tacoang (Tangafolan) tamdaw caay pidoedo to telek nanoya milaop to mipatay to Tacoang (Tangafolan) tamdaw, oya sato a Tacoang (Tangafolan) tamdaw sawad hanto ko kolong ato paliding, comikay to milaliw minokay tayra i Tacoang, o cikay niyam matiya to o malonem ko kahacikay, so'elinay to ranikay milaliw to kalaloodan, katengilan pangkiway to romi'ad milakec to lotok tahira to i niyaro' Tacoang saan ko katengil, nika kalimelaan toya kolong ato i palidingay a dafong, nika manga'ay aca awaay ko cimadoka'ay a mapatay ko tamdaw sato, oya sato 'osaw ko kakaenen to saka'orip . I 2022 miheca 8 folad, Fakong yakofa midemak to 145 mihecaan piharatengan demak, pangangan to lalood i Cepo' sanay . Pinengnengan to tilid
S.PHON: == …ĺat…ôkan no~u …ĺa…ĺo~uo~u…¨~…ģ i ¶…ôpo~u ° == o~u …ĺa…ĺo~uo~u…¨~…ģ i ¶…ôpo~u ° , …¨~…ģ…ômak i kiwit , ano~u …ô ¶a …ĺa…ĺo~uo~u…¨~…ģ i ¶…ôpo~u °, o~u ¶…ô ¶aj kasasiwto~u ¶ no~u so~ufitaj ato~u si ¶ian a …¨~…ģ…ômak no~u ka…ĺiŇčko~u, kasasiwto~u ¶ o~u itiniaj i ¶…ôpo~u ° ato~u kiwit °amis a tam…¨~…ģaw ato~u man ¶in, itini i **** mińß…ô ¶a pi…ĺijaŇč to~u "pipa ¶o~umo~u…¨~…ģ to~u sako~uwan i jin ¶o~u~umin a …¨~…ģ…ômak (kaisanfo~u~ufan)" a pi ¶iŇč ¶iŇč no~u so~ufitaj, tańßaiko~ur masamaŇčańß no~u so~ufitaj ira ko~u kapapataj no~u …¨~…ģ…ômak. …ĺat…ôkan a so~uwa…ĺ pakajni to~unini a …¨~…ģ…ômak o~u nai ¶i s…ôn pao~u ¶…ôn a "pa ¶o~umo~u…¨~…ģ to~u sako~uwan i jin ¶o~u~umin a …¨~…ģ…ômak (kaisanfo~u~ufan)" a satawo~u °, pa ¶o~umo~u…¨~…ģ…ôn ni wo~u~u *o~u~uaŇč…ĺiaŇč ko~u so~ufitaj tajni pasawa…ĺi, pa ¶o~ufi…ĺo~u sa mipa…ĺa…ĺan nai ko~uńßko~uńß taŇčasa i ¶…ôpo~u ° to~u …ĺa…ĺan, o~u niaanan ko~u sakapi…ĺijaŇč no~u kiwit nijaro~u °, …¨~…ģaf…¨~…ģaf nijaro~u °, °amisaj nijaro~u, itira to~u i ¶…ôpo~u ° ko~u kasasiwto~u ¶an. ¶aaj paka…ĺo~uwi…¨~…ģ ko~u so~ufitaj no~u man ¶in itija. o~urasaka o~u pano~uno~u °aj maŇčańßaj ko~u …¨~…ģ…ômak ni wo~u~u *o~u~uaŇč…ĺiaŇč, patir…ôŇč…ôn ko~u ka…ĺi °…ôpańßan, misamaŇčańß to~u kapańß no~u ¶…ôpo~u ° nijaro~u °; taŇčasa i kaf…ô ¶o~u…ĺan a ma…ĺasaŇč, awaajto~u ko~u °i ¶…ô…ĺ mi…ĺif…ôt, itija o~u ko~uwaŇč ko~u sapipataj to~u finaw…ĺan, saka ma…ômin to~u ma…ĺ…ôf…ôk ko~u kapańß no~u °amis fina ¶a…¨~…ģan itini i ¶…ôpo~u °. majakjak kina rato~uńß i nijaro~u ° i, misatapaŇč to~u ko~u finaw…ĺan mi…ĺa…ĺiw pakajni i …ĺo~uto~u…ĺo~uto~ukan ano~u …ô ¶a miti °…ôr to~u ro~uma a nijaro~u ° itija . iko~ur kat…ôŇči…ĺan a so~uwa…ĺ, o~u naitiniaj i sa °o~uw ¶ no~u ka…ĺiŇčko~u po~uso~uŇč a "ta ¶o~uaŇč (taŇčafo~u…ĺan) tam…¨~…ģaw" (taib~vo~uan fina ¶a…¨~…ģan tam…¨~…ģaw) ko~u mipa…¨~…ģaŇčaj to~u man ¶in so~ufitaj mi…ĺo~uo~u…¨~…ģ to~u °amis fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, …¨~…ģo~uto~u ¶…ôn ko~u nano~u so~uwa…ĺ no~u ta ¶o~uaŇč taib~vo~uan tam…¨~…ģaw, pakajni to~unini a …¨~…ģ…ômak o~u katatiińßan: sa °ajaw ira ko~u kasasipa…ĺo~uko~u mis…ô…ĺ…ônaj to~u fo~uko~u…ĺo~uńß ko~u taib~vo~uan ato~u °amis a tam…¨~…ģaw, akaa pipa…¨~…ģaŇč to~u so~ufitaj no~u man ¶in mi…ĺo~uo~u…¨~…ģ to~u ¶…ôpo~u ° ja sanaj, nika pas…ôka a pisa °a…¨~…ģa no~u so~ufitaj no~u man ¶in, mipa…¨~…ģaŇč a ¶a mi ¶o~u…ĺo~u ° to~u f…ô…ĺa ¶ kaka…ôn…ôn, saka…ĺa…ĺo~uo~u…¨~…ģ, kafo~uraw…ôn no~u °amis mapapatapataj, saka iko~ur o~u kasasiwto~u ¶an to~u no~u ko~unini a katatiińßan a …¨~…ģ…ômak: iko~ur no~u kapataj no~u so~ufitaj a ma…ĺiwasak, tajra ko~u °amis a tam…¨~…ģaw i ka °ajaw no~u ta ¶o~uaŇč (taŇčafo~u…ĺan) tam…¨~…ģaw pi ¶o~u…ĺo~u °an to~u …¨~…ģafo~uŇč, saka…ĺa…ĺo~uo~u…¨~…ģ, wata to~u ko~u nipatajan naŇčra a kańß…ôŇčaŇč to~u ko~u mata, man…ôŇčn…ôŇč ko~u ta ¶o~uaŇč (taŇčafo~u…ĺan) tam…¨~…ģaw o~u pitapa °, ira ko~u ta ¶o~uaŇč (taŇčafo~u…ĺan) tam…¨~…ģaw miso~u…¨~…ģo~u ¶ to~u po~u °o~ut a mi ¶o~u °aj, pakan…ôŇčn…ôŇč ko~u tatińßiaj a ta ¶o~uaŇč (taŇčafo~u…ĺan) tam…¨~…ģaw to~u kapataj no~u ¶…ôfaŇč i, ana mapataj kako~u nasa, miso~u…¨~…ģo~u ¶ to~u po~u °o~ut mipa…¨~…ģaŇč to~u kapo~ut mipataj to~u °amis a tam…¨~…ģaw, ro~umaro~uma a °amiis a tam…¨~…ģaw pakan…ôŇčn…ôŇč to~unini i wata ko~u ka…ĺim, par…ôtat…ôŇča o~u ta ¶o~uaŇč (taŇčafo~u…ĺan) tam…¨~…ģaw ¶aaj pi…¨~…ģo~u…ô…¨~…ģo~u to~u t…ô…ĺ…ôk nano~uja mi…ĺao~up to~u mipataj to~u ta ¶o~uaŇč (taŇčafo~u…ĺan) tam…¨~…ģaw, o~uja sato~u a ta ¶o~uaŇč (taŇčafo~u…ĺan) tam…¨~…ģaw sawa…¨~…ģ ńßanto~u ko~u ko~u…ĺo~uŇč ato~u pa…ĺi…¨~…ģiŇč, ¶o~umikaj to~u mi…ĺa…ĺiw mino~ukaj tajra i ta ¶o~uaŇč, o~u ¶ikaj nijam matija to~u o~u ma…ĺo~un…ôm ko~u kańßa ¶ikaj, so~u °…ô…ĺinaj to~u ranikaj mi…ĺa…ĺiw to~u ka…ĺa…ĺo~uo~u…¨~…ģan, kat…ôŇči…ĺan paŇčkiwaj to~u ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ mi…ĺak…ô ¶ to~u …ĺo~uto~uk tańßira to~u i nijaro~u ° ta ¶o~uaŇč saan ko~u kat…ôŇči…ĺ, nika ka…ĺim…ô…ĺaan to~uja ko~u…ĺo~uŇč ato~u i pa…ĺi…¨~…ģiŇčaj a …¨~…ģafo~uŇč, nika maŇča °aj a ¶a awaaj ko~u ¶ima…¨~…ģo~uka °aj a mapataj paŇčaŇčan to~u …ĺa…ĺo~uo~u…¨~…ģ i ¶…ôpo~u ° sanaj . pin…ôŇčn…ôŇčan to~u ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ
S.FORM: == Latekan no lalood i Cepo' == O lalood i Cepo' , demak i Kiwit , ano eca Lalood i Cepo', o cecay kasasiwtoc no sofitay ato sician a demak no Kalingko, kasasiwtoc o itiniay i Cepo' ato Kiwit 'Amis a tamdaw ato Mancin, itini i 1877 miheca piliyang to "Pipacomod to sakowan i yincumin a demak (Kaisanfufan)" a picingcing no sofitay, tahaikor masamangah no sofitay ira ko kapapatay no demak. Latekan a sowal Pakayni tonini a demak o nai ci Sen Paocen a "Pacomod to sakowan i yincumin a demak (Kaisanfufan)" a satawo', pacomoden ni Wu Guangliang ko sofitay tayni pasawali, pacofilo sa mipalalan nai Kohkoh tangasa i Cepo' to lalan, o niaanan ko sakapiliyang no Kiwit niyaro', Dafdaf niyaro', 'Amisay niyaro, itira to i Cepo' ko kasasiwtocan. Caay pakalowid ko sofitay no Mancin itiya. Orasaka o panono'ay mangahay ko demak ni Wu Guangliang, patirengen ko kali'epahan, misamangah to kapah no Cepo' niyaro'; tangasa i kafecolan a malasang, awaayto ko 'icel milifet, itiya o kowang ko sapipatay to finawlan, saka maemin to malefek ko kapah no 'Amis finacadan itini i Cepo'. Mayakyak kina ratoh i niyaro' i, misatapang to ko finawlan milaliw pakayni i lotolotokan ano eca miti'er to roma a niyaro' itiya . Ikor katengilan a sowal, o naitiniay i sa'owc no Kalingko Posong a "Tacoang (Tangafolan) tamdaw" (Taivoan finacadan tamdaw) ko mipadangay to Mancin sofitay milood to 'Amis finacadan, dotocen ko nano sowal no Tacoang Taivoan tamdaw, pakayni tonini a demak o katatiihan: sa'ayaw ira ko kasasipaloko miselenay to fokoloh ko Taivoan ato 'Amis a tamdaw, akaa pipadang to sofitay no Mancin milood to Cepo' ya sanay, nika paseka a pisa'ada no sofitay no Mancin, mipadang aca micolo' to felac kakaenen, sakalalood, kaforawen no 'Amis mapapatapatay, saka ikor o kasasiwtocan to no konini a katatiihan a demak: Ikor no kapatay no sofitay a maliwasak, tayra ko 'Amis a tamdaw i ka'ayaw no Tacoang (Tangafolan) tamdaw picolo'an to dafong, sakalalood, wata to ko nipatayan nangra a kahengang to ko mata, manengneng ko Tacoang (Tangafolan) tamdaw o pitapa', ira ko Tacoang (Tangafolan) tamdaw misodoc to po'ot a mico'ay, pakanengneng ko tatihiay a Tacoang (Tangafolan) tamdaw to kapatay no cefang i, ana mapatay kako nasa, misodoc to po'ot mipadang to kapot mipatay to 'Amis a tamdaw, romaroma a 'Amiis a tamdaw pakanengneng tonini i wata ko kalim, paretatenga o Tacoang (Tangafolan) tamdaw caay pidoedo to telek nanoya milaop to mipatay to Tacoang (Tangafolan) tamdaw, oya sato a Tacoang (Tangafolan) tamdaw sawad hanto ko kolong ato paliding, comikay to milaliw minokay tayra i Tacoang, o cikay niyam matiya to o malonem ko kahacikay, so'elinay to ranikay milaliw to kalaloodan, katengilan pangkiway to romi'ad milakec to lotok tahira to i niyaro' Tacoang saan ko katengil, nika kalimelaan toya kolong ato i palidingay a dafong, nika manga'ay aca awaay ko cimadoka'ay a mapatay ko tamdaw sato, oya sato 'osaw ko kakaenen to saka'orip . I 2022 miheca 8 folad, Fakong yakofa midemak to 145 mihecaan piharatengan demak, pangangan to lalood i Cepo' sanay . Pinengnengan to tilid
S.PHON: == …ĺat…ôkan no~u …ĺa…ĺo~uo~u…¨~…ģ i ¶…ôpo~u ° == o~u …ĺa…ĺo~uo~u…¨~…ģ i ¶…ôpo~u ° , …¨~…ģ…ômak i kiwit , ano~u …ô ¶a …ĺa…ĺo~uo~u…¨~…ģ i ¶…ôpo~u °, o~u ¶…ô ¶aj kasasiwto~u ¶ no~u so~ufitaj …ĺo~uto~u…ĺo~uto~ukan ano~u …ô ¶a miti °…ôr to~u ro~uma a nijaro~u ° itija . iko~ur kat…ôŇči…ĺan a so~uwa…ĺ, o~u naitiniaj i sa °o~uw ¶ no~u ka…ĺiŇčko~u po~uso~uŇč a "ta ¶o~uaŇč (taŇčafo~u…ĺan) °amis a tam…¨~…ģaw i ka °ajaw no~u ta ¶o~uaŇč (taŇčafo~u…ĺan) tam…¨~…ģaw pi ¶o~u…ĺo~u °an to~u …¨~…ģafo~uŇč, saka…ĺa…ĺo~uo~u…¨~…ģ, wata to~u ko~u nipatajan naŇčra a kańß…ôŇčaŇč to~u ko~u mata, ¶o~uaŇč (taŇčafo~u…ĺan) tam…¨~…ģaw to~u kapataj no~u ¶…ôfaŇč i, ana mapataj kako~u nasa, miso~u…¨~…ģo~u ¶ to~u po~u °o~ut mipa…¨~…ģaŇč to~u kapo~ut mipataj to~u °amis a tam…¨~…ģaw, ro~umaro~uma a °amiis a tam…¨~…ģaw pakan…ôŇčn…ôŇč to~unini i wata ko~u ka…ĺim, par…ôtat…ôŇča o~u ta ¶o~uaŇč (taŇčafo~u…ĺan) tam…¨~…ģaw ¶aaj pi…¨~…ģo~u…ô…¨~…ģo~u to~u t…ô…ĺ…ôk nano~uja mi…ĺao~up to~u mipataj to~u ta ¶o~uaŇč (taŇčafo~u…ĺan) tam…¨~…ģaw, o~uja sato~u a ta ¶o~uaŇč (taŇčafo~u…ĺan) tam…¨~…ģaw sawa…¨~…ģ ńßanto~u ko~u ko~u…ĺo~uŇč ato~u pa…ĺi…¨~…ģiŇč, ¶o~umikaj to~u mi…ĺa…ĺiw mino~ukaj tajra i ta ¶o~uaŇč, o~u ¶ikaj nijam matija to~u o~u ma…ĺo~un…ôm ko~u kańßa ¶ikaj, so~u °…ô…ĺinaj to~u ranikaj mi…ĺa…ĺiw to~u ka…ĺa…ĺo~uo~u…¨~…ģan, kat…ôŇči…ĺan paŇčkiwaj to~u ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ mi…ĺak…ô ¶ to~u …ĺo~uto~uk tańßira to~u i nijaro~u ° ta ¶o~uaŇč saan ko~u kat…ôŇči…ĺ, nika ka…ĺim…ô…ĺaan to~uja ko~u…ĺo~uŇč ato~u i pa…ĺi…¨~…ģiŇčaj a …¨~…ģafo~uŇč, nika maŇča °aj a ¶a awaaj ko~u ¶ima…¨~…ģo~uka °aj a mapataj ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw sato~u, o~uja sato~u °o~usaw ko~u kaka…ôn…ôn to~u saka °o~urip . i **** mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ, fako~uŇč jako~ufa mi…¨~…ģ…ômak to~u *** mińß…ô ¶aan pińßarat…ôŇčan …¨~…ģ…ômak, paŇčaŇčan to~u …ĺa…ĺo~uo~u…¨~…ģ i ¶…ôpo~u ° sanaj . pin…ôŇčn…ôŇčan to~u ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ
